title: KitchenPerfected 1.0Ltr Compact Deep Fryer / Non-Stick / Thermostat Control / Frying Basket With Removable Handle / Non-Slip Feet / Detachable Lid / Viewing Window - Ivory White - E6010WI
features: HEAT INDICATOR: The heat indicator helps to fry your food perfectly. It indicates when the deep fryer is heating up, once the temperature set by the thermostatic control is reached, the indicator will turn off to inform users that it is ready for use.
VIEWING WINDOW: This allows you to observe the cooking process without having to open the lid, the lid allows for safer frying as it stops any oil from spitting out of the fryer during use.
POWER INDICATOR: This indicates that there is power to the fryer and that the unit is operational.
THERMOSTATIC TEMPERATURE CONTROL: This allows you to adjust the temperature accordingly. This fryer uses thermostatic technology to keep the temperature set by the user.
NON-SLIP FEET: The rubber feet stop the unit from sliding or tipping during use.
Do not overfill passed the MAX mark with oil.
description: The KitchenPerfected 1.0Ltr Compact Deep Fryer is a small convenient appliance that features a heat indicator helps to fry your food perfectly. It indicates when the deep fryer is heating up, once the temperature set by the thermostatic control is reached, the indicator will turn off to inform users that it is ready for use. With a viewing window, you are able to observe the cooking process without having to open the lid, the lid allows for safer frying as it stops any oil from splashing out of the fryer during use. The power indicator shows that there is power to the dryer and that the unit is operational. This device is controlled by thermostatic temperature; this allows you to adjust the temperature accordingly. This fryer uses thermostatic technology to keep the temperature set by the user. This also acts as the on/off switch. The rubber feet are non-slip to prevent the unit from sliding or tipping during use. Box Includes: 1 x KitchenPerfected 1.0Ltr Compact Deep Fryer 1 x Instruction Manual
